notes: Brazil were without Neymar (confirmed absent, Grade 2 calf strain) and Ancelotti rotated Casemiro/Fabinho and started Matheus Cunha over Igor Thiago; Raphinha suffered a hamstring injury during the match and is now a doubt going forward. Haiti lost pre-tournament squad member Leverton Pierre (muscle problem, tournament-ending), and had no other confirmed injury absences, though they were eliminated after a second straight defeat.
home_scorers: Matheus Cunha (leading striker/rotation starter, scored twice vs Haiti)
Vinicius Jr (star winger, scored in stoppage time, involved in all 3 goals)
Raphinha (attacking threat from wide, started before going off injured)
away_scorers: Wilson Isidor (Sunderland attacker, 2 goals in 5 caps, main offensive threat)
Frantzdy Pierro (forward, part of Haiti's limited attacking options)
Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (creative midfielder, set-piece and transition threat)
